---
title: "scDiffCom-Preprocessing-Checks"
output: html_document
---

<!-- Backward-compatible entry point. Knit from RStudio with working directory = preprocess/ -->

```{r wrapper, include=FALSE}
checks_index <- "preprocessing_checks/index.Rmd"
if (!file.exists(checks_index)) {
  stop("Expected ", checks_index, " relative to Thesis/CCC/scripts/scDiffCom/preprocess/")
}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("preprocessing_checks"))
```

```{r child = "preprocessing_checks/index.Rmd"}
```
